d070.pace_assessment: WILL NOT MEET ORIGINAL TARGET. 21 retired in 39 sessions (0.54/session). Need 8 more in 1 session — impossible to complete wq-739, wq-744, and wq-745 in a single B session. A#172 recommended extending if missed. The 96→75 reduction (21.9%) is short of the 30% target (29 retirements) but represents real infrastructure improvement.
